observation: Shipped creator-orphan-script-route: 26/26 creator-*.ts files matched, 0 orphans. Check detects orphan source files (scripts without package.json entries) — inverse of creator-script-health. Promoted to retained_routes (now 22 retained routes). Selected creator-example-check-coverage-route as next winner. Added creator-post-check-coverage-route as fresh candidate (maintaining 3 active mutations). All baseline gates pass: 24/24 regression, 0/0 parity drift, 4/4 autonomy.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, keep scripts and docs in sync, reduce noise in regression output, and catch orphan files and uncovered check gaps

candidates.mutation: Add regression noise filtering (bun creator:regression-filter) that suppresses known pre-existing bun-types lint noise in regression output, producing a clean PASS/FAIL surface report — improving autonomous Darwin signal-to-noise ratio.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-regression-filter.ts that wraps the regression orchestrator, filters out known pre-existing bun-types lint errors from output, and reports only actionable failures
candidates.risk: Blocked: regression is currently clean (24/24 PASS), no noise to filter. May become relevant if bun-types updates introduce new pre-existing lint noise into TypeScript compilation output during bun run.

candidates.mutation: Add an example surface check coverage audit (bun creator:example-check-coverage) that discovers all examples/creator-*.html surfaces and verifies each has a corresponding creator:*check script in package.json — catching surfaces that were added to examples/ but lack machine gate verification.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-example-check-coverage.ts that reads examples/ directory, finds all creator-*.html files, maps to expected check scripts via naming convention, verifies existence and execution, and reports PASS/MISSING per surface
candidates.risk: Surface naming conventions may not always map 1:1 to check script names (e.g., creator-prompt-dna-adapter.html maps to creator:prompt-dna-check, not creator:prompt-dna-adapter-check). Must maintain a known mapping table similar to docs-surface-parity pattern. Additionally, some creator scripts (contact-sheet-check) generate artifacts rather than validating static HTML surfaces.

candidates.mutation: Add a post-check coverage audit (bun creator:post-check-coverage) that verifies every examples/creator-*.html surface has a corresponding .artifacts/creator-*-qa.md evidence file, confirming that QA evidence generation (vision/DOM) is complete for all retained surfaces — catching surfaces where QA drift leaves stale or missing evidence files.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-post-check-coverage.ts that reads examples/ directory, maps each surface to its expected .artifacts QA path, verifies file exists and contains required evidence markers (vision/DOM summary, browser_console metrics, boundary notes), and reports PASS/MISSING per surface
candidates.risk: QA files are .gitignored, may not exist if never generated. Some surfaces (contact-sheet) generate QA via different paths. Must handle surfaces with alternative QA artifact locations (motion-storyboard.json vs contact-sheet.html). Surface-to-QA mapping may require a known table.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface
unified regression orchestrator (24-check surface + autonomy + hackathon:score in one pass)
unified artifact-measurement gateway (all 11 retained surface HTML artifacts)
Per-surface health check (dynamically discovers all creator-*.html surfaces)
Script source file health check (validates every creator:* package.json script has an existing source file)
Orphan script detection (discovers scripts/creator-*.ts files without package.json entries — 26/26 matched, 0 orphans)
WORKFLOW_INDEX gate health check (cross-references all 32 gates against package.json scripts, validates existence and execution — 32/32 PASS)

retention: Promoted creator-orphan-script-route from candidates[] selected winner to retained_routes[] (shipped: 26/26 files matched, 0 orphans, wired into regression orchestrator after script-health). Selected creator-example-check-coverage-route as next winner.
